title: Testing Component Rendering Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on component rendering verification.

questions.question: Regarding frontend testing, what is the primary role of component rendering testing?
options: To verify that a React component correctly displays its user interface based on its current props and state

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of testing component rendering within your project's unit tests?
options: It increases your confidence in the correctness of your application's user interface
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
